context_notes: Phase 01 completed and PR #281 updated with documentation improvements. The consolidated ocp_virt_vm template is ready for merge. Key blocker: Windows VM boot incomplete - reaches KubeVirt Running state but doesn't boot past 'Booting from hard disk'. Need to debug sysprep/CloudBase-Init/driver configuration before Phase 2 (desktop verification) can proceed.
